@@ -87,7 +87,7 @@ {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5zm","title":"Implement report_failure() with structured output","description":"# Task: Implement report_failure() with structured output ## Context Part of EPIC: Per-Phase Error Reporting (agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-fkf) ## What to Do Create a comprehensive failure report function: ### Human Output (terminal) ``` ╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗ ║ ✖ INSTALLATION FAILED ║ ║ ║ ║ Phase 6/10: Language Runtimes ║ ║ Failed at: Installing Rust via rustup ║ ║ ║ ║ Error: curl: (7) Failed to connect to sh.rustup.rs ║ ║ ║ ║ Suggested Fix: ║ ║ 1. Check internet: curl -I https://google.com ║ ║ 2. Retry: curl ... | bash -s -- --resume ║ ║ ║ ║ Full log: /var/log/acfs/install.log ║ ╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝ ``` ### JSON Output (log file) Append structured JSON to install.log for tooling. ### With gum Use gum style for prettier box drawing. ## Acceptance Criteria - Shows phase number and name - Shows specific step that failed - Shows error excerpt (truncated if long) - Shows suggested fix from ERROR_PATTERNS - Shows resume command - Works with and without gum ## Files to Modify - install.sh: Add report_failure() function","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-21T12:44:00.671428-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-21T14:47:14.92113-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-21T14:47:14.92113-05:00","close_reason":"Created scripts/lib/report.sh with report_failure(), report_success(), report_warning(), report_skipped_summary(). Supports gum styling, JSON logging, and suggested fixes from ERROR_PATTERNS.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5zm","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-vwv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-21T12:47:30.834519-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5zm","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-qqo","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-21T12:47:31.011809-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]} {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-5zt","title":"Design state.json v2 schema","description":"# Task: Design state.json v2 schema ## Context Part of EPIC: Phase-Granular Progress Persistence ## Critical Design Decision: Track Phase IDs, Not Numbers **Problem with tracking phase numbers:** If we store `completed_phases: [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]` and later ACFS reorders phases or adds a new phase 3, the resume logic would skip the wrong phases. **Solution:** Track phase IDs (stable identifiers): ```json { "schema_version": 2, "completed_phases": ["user_setup", "apt_packages", "shell_setup", "cli_tools", "languages"], "current_phase": "agents", ... } ``` ## Full Schema ```json { "schema_version": 2, "version": "0.1.0", "mode": "vibe", "started_at": "2025-01-15T10:30:00Z", "last_updated": "2025-01-15T10:42:00Z", "completed_phases": ["user_setup", "apt_packages", "shell_setup"], "current_phase": "cli_tools", "current_step": "Installing ripgrep", "failed_phase": null, "failed_step": null, "skipped_tools": ["ntm", "bv"], "skipped_phases": ["postgres", "vault"], "phase_durations": { "user_setup": 12, "apt_packages": 45 } } ``` ## Phase IDs (stable, never change meaning) - user_setup - apt_packages - shell_setup - cli_tools - languages - tools - database - cloud - agents - stack - finalize ## Backwards Compatibility - If schema_version missing or 1: treat as legacy, offer fresh start - Phase IDs are strings, won't conflict with old number-based format ## Acceptance Criteria - Schema uses phase IDs not numbers - Documented in code comments - Backwards compatible with v1 detection - All fields have sensible defaults","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-21T12:42:39.486596-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-21T14:39:43.137058-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-21T14:39:43.137058-05:00","close_reason":"Already implemented in scripts/lib/state.sh. Schema v2 uses phase IDs, is documented, and has backwards compatibility."} {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-6fx","title":"cloud_db.sh: verify respects SKIP flags + optional installs","description":"scripts/lib/cloud_db.sh claims to respect SKIP_POSTGRES/SKIP_VAULT/SKIP_CLOUD in install_all_cloud_db, but verify_cloud_db still fails if those tools are intentionally skipped.","acceptance_criteria":"- With SKIP_POSTGRES=true, verify_cloud_db does not mark psql missing as failure. - With SKIP_VAULT=true, verify_cloud_db does not mark vault missing as failure. - With SKIP_CLOUD=true, verify_cloud_db does not mark cloud CLIs missing as failure.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-20T14:45:03.242319-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-20T14:52:41.60688-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-20T14:52:41.60688-05:00","close_reason":"Updated verify_cloud_db to honor SKIP_POSTGRES/SKIP_VAULT/SKIP_CLOUD so skips don't count as failures."} -{"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-6pto","title":"Task: Add credit card and email verification warnings to rent-vps","description":"","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-22T23:46:08.892768-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T13:13:56.059571-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-6pto","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-qxj8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T23:52:38.507419-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel"}]} +{"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-6pto","title":"Task: Add credit card and email verification warnings to rent-vps","description":"","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-22T23:46:08.892768-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T13:14:44.855461-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-23T13:14:44.855461-05:00","close_reason":"Added credit card and email verification warnings to rent-vps page","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-6pto","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-qxj8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T23:52:38.507419-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel"}]} {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-6r9o","title":"Enhance terminal copy/paste instructions with dedicated section","description":"# Task: Enhance Terminal Copy/Paste Instructions ## Parent Epic [EPIC] Terminal Onboarding Foundation (agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-ux1f) ## Current State Copy/paste instructions currently exist in: - generate-ssh-key/page.tsx Step 3 (Mac and Windows paste shortcuts) - ssh-connect/page.tsx Step 3 (same) However, users encounter copy/paste FIRST in install-terminal when downloading, so a dedicated section there would help. ## Enhancement Add a dedicated GuideSection in install-terminal/page.tsx SimplerGuide with comprehensive copy/paste instructions: ```tsx

Terminal copy/paste works a bit differently than other apps:

Mac (Ghostty/WezTerm)

  • ⌘ + C to copy
  • ⌘ + V to paste
  • Works just like other Mac apps!

Windows (Windows Terminal)

  • Right-click to paste (easiest!)
  • Or use Ctrl + Shift + C/V
  • Note: Ctrl + C STOPS commands, it does not copy!
 ``` ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] Consolidates copy/paste instructions in install-terminal (first encounter) - [ ] Mac instructions are clear and simple - [ ] Windows instructions warn about Ctrl+C danger - [ ] Uses kbd styling for key combinations - [ ] OS-conditional display (show only relevant OS) ## Note This enhances existing scattered mentions with a dedicated, comprehensive section.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-22T13:39:41.923436-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-22T14:21:11.767553-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-22T14:21:11.767553-05:00","close_reason":"Already implemented: TerminalBasicsSection in install-terminal/page.tsx has dedicated copy/paste section with Mac (cmd+C/V) and Windows (right-click, Ctrl+Shift+V) instructions, including Ctrl+C warning for Windows"} {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-6stg","title":"Task: Add SSH disconnect warning with reconnection instructions","description":"","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-22T23:47:15.391045-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-22T23:47:15.391045-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-6stg","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-r1z5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T23:52:49.078227-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel"}]} {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-6w9u","title":"Create dedicated /glossary page","description":"# Task: Create Dedicated Glossary Page ## Parent Epic [EPIC] Jargon System & Documentation Polish (agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-7i45) ## Description Create a comprehensive, searchable glossary page where users can look up technical terms. This provides a deeper reference than tooltips and helps users who want to understand the concepts more fully. ## Implementation Details Location: apps/web/app/glossary/page.tsx \`\`\`tsx // Key features: // 1. Alphabetical listing of all terms // 2. Search/filter functionality // 3. Categorization (Shell, Networking, Tools, etc.) // 4. Detailed explanations (more than tooltip) // 5. Links to relevant wizard steps or lessons interface GlossaryEntry { term: string; short: string; // Tooltip version long: string; // Full explanation category: 'shell' | 'networking' | 'tools' | 'concepts'; relatedTerms?: string[]; learnMore?: string; // Link to lesson } \`\`\` Page should include: - Search box at top - Category filters - Clean, scannable layout - Mobile-friendly (single column) - Links from jargon tooltips to glossary entries ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] All terms from Jargon component included - [ ] Search filters results in real-time - [ ] Categories help organize terms - [ ] Long explanations are thorough but accessible - [ ] Links to related wizard steps where applicable - [ ] Mobile-responsive design ## UI/UX Notes - This is a reference page, not a learning page - Users might land here from Google searches - Consider SEO implications (good meta descriptions) - Use same visual style as rest of site","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-22T13:45:10.252228-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-22T14:43:47.598957-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-22T14:43:47.598957-05:00","close_reason":"Completed (new /glossary page with live search + category filters; added Jargon tooltip links to glossary anchors)","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-6w9u","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-367d","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T13:57:43.702732-05:00","created_by":"jemanuel"}]}
